calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 316512 McDonald vs. Gatlin and Case No. 322 899 Marx vs. Gatlin. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-18-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2002 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2002 Continued To Mar-25-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael K. Tcheng, 415-391-6182, appeared on behalf of defendants and moving parties Krista Gatlin, et al. Steven J. McDonald, 415-642-7300, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Martina Johnson-Kent.

After argument the court adopted its tentative ruling: defendants' motion for summary judgment is denied. Triable issue of material fact exists as to the good faith and honest intent of the owner move-in. See plaintiff's statement of disputed fact at number 33. Triable issue of material fact also exists as to whether complaint filed within statute of limitations See plaintiff's disputed facts 53, 53, and 55. (KH) Hon. James J. McBride. Reporter Judy Thomsen, CSR 5591

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
